description: CompositionBlue jacket made of 53% polyester and 47% cotton, has long sleeves that have ribbed cuffs with yellow tipping and a dark navy blue strip running from the neckline to the sleeve cuffs, ribbed mock neck with yellow tipping, zippered closure on the front, insert pockets on the sides with zippered closures, embroidered swoosh logo on the upper left chest, appliqued brand badge on the upper left chest, yellow piping on the upper back that extends to the sleeve cuffs, FCB lettering in flock print on the upper back and a ribbed hemline with yellow tippingFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryEnjoy the winter in style in this FCB football training jacket from nike. The simple style is complemented by the bold club seal and club initials paying homage to the victories of the Barcelona soccer team, while the fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth. Team this with long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes.
